title: Eclipsed Origins
description: A small modpack designed for use by players of a local server being hosted privately.
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d32cdcaa7c9760ac4fe8617449f6661942cf0d2.png)


This modpack is designed for players on a server I am hosting. Others may use it, but it is balanced around a slight vanilla-plus origins themed server. Please, inform me if any specific mods included in this pack need credit, as I am rather new to uploading modpacks publicly.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

Pack has been built off of [https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) Since version [1.7].
